why_choose_reason_2_desc: Full support for Hindi, Telugu, and English.

hero_title: Gram Sahayak AI – Your Digital Guide to Government Services
hero_subtitle: Access government schemes, certificates, welfare programs, and official documents in your own language with AI-powered assistance.
hero_description: Gram Sahayak AI helps citizens understand government services, eligibility requirements, application procedures, certificates, and official documents through simple conversations. Get accurate information from verified government sources in English, Hindi, and Telugu.
about_desc1: Gram Sahayak AI is an intelligent citizen assistance platform designed to simplify access to government information and welfare services. Many citizens find government documents difficult to understand due to technical language and complex procedures. Our platform transforms official information into clear, simple, and easy-to-understand guidance.
about_desc2: Using advanced Artificial Intelligence and verified government documents, Gram Sahayak AI helps users:
about_mission: Our mission is to make government services more accessible, transparent, and citizen-friendly.
feature_reliable_desc: Answers are generated using verified government documents and trusted sources.
feature_multilingual_desc: Interact in English, Hindi, or Telugu and receive responses in your preferred language.
feature_easy_desc: Complex government terminology is simplified into citizen-friendly language.
feature_ai_desc: Get instant assistance for schemes, certificates, forms, and applications.
feature_secure_desc: Your chats, profile preferences, and uploaded documents remain secure.
feature_rural_desc: Designed specifically for farmers, students, workers, women, entrepreneurs, and senior citizens.
services_subtitle: Explore a wide range of citizen-centric services powered by AI and verified government information.
service_eligibility_desc: Check if you qualify for benefits.
service_certificate_desc: How to apply for official certificates.
how_step1_desc: Citizens ask questions in their preferred language.
how_step2_desc: The system searches trusted government documents and knowledge sources.
how_step3_desc: AI analyzes the context and identifies the most relevant information.
how_step4_desc: Receive accurate, easy-to-understand answers with source references.
impact_desc: Gram Sahayak AI bridges the gap between citizens and government services by making information accessible, understandable, and available in local languages. Our goal is to reduce confusion, improve awareness, and increase access to welfare benefits.
cta_title: Ready to Access Government Services Smarter?
cta_desc: Start chatting with Gram Sahayak AI today and get instant guidance on welfare schemes, certificates, official documents, and government services in your preferred language.
footer_tagline: Empowering rural citizens with multilingual AI assistance for government schemes, certificates, official documents, and welfare services. Making government information simple, accessible, and understandable for everyone.
footer_motto: "Bridging Citizens and Government Services Through AI."
footer_copyright: © 2026 Gram Sahayak AI. All Rights Reserved.
